sentence: 学语言不仅仅是背单词。
pinyin: Xué yǔ yán bù jǐn jǐn shì bèi dān cí.
english: Learning a language is not just about memorizing vocabulary.

meaning: vocational high school (abbr. to 技校[ji4 xiao4])
sentence: 他没考上大学，就去读了技术学校。
pinyin: Tā méi kǎo shàng dà xué, jiù qù dú le jì shù xué xiào.
english: He didn't get into university, so he enrolled in a vocational school.

sentence: 他在境外工作了两年才回来。
pinyin: Tā zài jìng wài gōng zuò le liǎng nián cái huí lái.
english: He worked outside the country for two years before coming back.

sentence: 她来台已经三年了，普通话说得很好。
pinyin: Tā lái tái yǐ jīng sān nián le, pǔ tōng huà shuō de hěn hǎo.
english: She has been in Taiwan for three years now and speaks Mandarin very well.

sentence: 孩子们在海滩上堆沙堡。
pinyin: Háizimen zài hǎitān shang duī shābǎo.
english: The kids are building sandcastles on the beach.
